title: coaching — field classification
description: Coaching entities carry a mix of tiers. Public: structural + slugs. Internal: verification state + activity flags. Confidential: bio + notes + verification-document reference. Regulated financial: hourly_rate_cents (7-year retention; NEVER surfaces on platform-admin reads). Regulated minor: coach-of-minors-adjacent — coach identifiers referenced by athlete rows for minor athletes are subject to the athlete module's redactor chain.

confidential: CoachingProfile.photo_url_signed (signed S3 URL; expires per storage policy)
CoachCertification.document_url (signed S3 URL for scanned cert)
regulated_minor: For coaches assigned to sessions/teams/events involving MINOR athletes: coach identifiers referenced in the athlete module's redactor chain are subject to the same regulated_minor stripping as the athlete's own PII on cross-tenant platform-admin reads.

Photo URLs for coaches whose CoachAssignment.assignable resolves to a minor-eligible cohort require the signed-URL to have a `hint=minors_cohort` marker so downstream renderers can apply extra scrutiny.
regulated_financial: CoachingProfile.hourly_rate_cents (7-year retention; NEVER surfaces on platform-admin reads; admin permission `coaching_profiles.view.rate` required)
CoachingProfile.rate_currency (paired with hourly_rate_cents; same access controls)
audit_log: CoachAssignment.role (every change — cascade effect on notifications + attendance)
CoachAssignment.end_date (every change — audit-critical for wage-and-hour compliance)

notes: Coaches' PII (name, email, phone) lives on their linked user::Profile — the redactor chain applies transitively when a CoachingProfile is read.

Every certification-related audit event surfaces on the notification-templates: coach + admin receive the emails; safeguarding_officer receives the alerts for SafeSport / medical-related certification lapses.
hourly_rate_cents on the profile is REFERENCE data — it's used by scheduling logic to plan a coach's weekly economic capacity but payroll writeback belongs in a Finance module (not owned here).
CoachSkillRating.notes carries free-text rationale from the rating admin. HR-visible only; does NOT surface on the coach's /me/ratings response (a coach sees their rating value but not the notes).
